title: Add MapLibre place proof
goal: Add a bounded map proof that renders seed place and hybrid projects with privacy-aware location modes.

acceptance.assertion: A commonworld map route renders seed projects from the catalog fixtures.
exact, approximate and hidden location modes are visually and behaviorally distinct.
The map proof does not require a new backend or write path.

supporting_prs.title: proofs: cover exact map privacy mode
supporting_prs.head: b0dba42cfb479d46decc443d288725040f0c6028

supporting_prs.title: docs: mark map source config implemented

metadata.outcome: Commonworld contains a static MapLibre/CARTO proof surface that renders location-safe seed projects, skips hidden projects, distinguishes approximate and exact location modes, and keeps API/backend/write paths out of scope.

verified_acceptance.map-route: proofs/map/index.html loads the static proof; proofs/map/map.js consumes seed projects and adds MapLibre markers only for map-renderable entries from the CommonProject fixtures.
verified_acceptance.privacy-modes: validate_map_proof.py and tests/test_map_proof.py cover hidden projects as non-renderable, approximate projects with an approximate-location halo, and exact projects without the halo.
verified_acceptance.no-api-coupling: proofs/map/README.md and index copy explicitly state no backend, no public submissions and no weltgewebe write path; validation passed without adding runtime services.

validation: Commonworld PR #3 GitHub validate/contracts check SUCCESS.
Commonworld PR #19 GitHub validate/contracts check SUCCESS.
Local: python3 -m unittest tests.test_map_proof tests.test_map_source_config tests.test_map_source_strategy passed (20 tests).
